message:
feat(scheduler): add cancel-lane preemption metrics and fairness proof (bd-1tiq)

Add PreemptionMetrics struct tracking per-worker cancel/timed/ready
dispatches, fairness yields, max cancel streak, and fallback dispatches.
Instrument the next_task() scheduling loop to record metrics at every
dispatch point. Include formal proof sketch for bounded fairness under
sustained cancel injection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
